scope.note: single vertical slice; one top-dir apps/cockpit

size.note: round-trip slice (backend route + lib + 4 components + 5 test files + docs); cohesive single concern

completeness.note: every new source file has a paired test; 5 new test files

watch_list.note: entities read with sequential await in nested loops; bounded (per-change brain, tens of entities, one read per panel open) — not a hot path. Could use Promise.all but fail-soft sequential is simpler + correct. No delta.

architecture.note: new brain route composes existing requireChange + resolveWorktreeRoot ports; no new port; client→server HTTP seam preserved; read-only gate clean

security.note: renderMarkdown escapes all source before emitting bounded tag subset; link scheme allow-list drops javascript:; .html in sandbox='' iframe; no new write/process path (read-only gate: 118 files clean)

quality.note: typecheck+lint+prettier clean; every new file tested; JSX identifiers all in scope; no dead surface; no contract drift
